allow: Bash(cmd //c "docker ps --filter name=mysql --format '{{.Names}} {{.Status}}' 2>&1 && docker ps -a --filter name=mysql --format '{{.Names}} {{.Status}}' 2>&1")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -uroot -pwsxhr666 -e "USE minddream; SHOW TABLES; SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS table_count FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='minddream';")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -uroot -pwsxhr666 -e "USE minddream; SELECT 'dreams' AS table_name, COUNT\(*\) AS rows FROM dreams UNION ALL SELECT 'statistics', COUNT\(*\) FROM statistics;")
Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -uroot -pwsxhr666 -e "USE minddream; SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM dreams; SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM statistics;")
Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -uroot -pwsxhr666 -e "USE minddream; SELECT emotions_cn FROM dreams WHERE emotions_cn IS NOT NULL AND emotions_cn != '' LIMIT 10;")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -uroot -pwsxhr666 -e "USE minddream; SELECT gender, age_group, COUNT\(*\) FROM dreams GROUP BY gender, age_group ORDER BY gender, age_group;")
Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -uroot -pwsxhr666 -e "USE minddream; SELECT emotions_cn FROM dreams WHERE emotions_cn IS NOT NULL AND emotions_cn != '' LIMIT 5;")
Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -uroot -pwsxhr666 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "USE minddream; SELECT DISTINCT age_group FROM dreams;")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -uroot -pwsxhr666 --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "USE minddream; SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX\(SUBSTRING_INDEX\(REPLACE\(REPLACE\(emotions_cn, '[', ''\), ']', ''\), ',', numbers.n\), ',', -1\) AS emotion FROM \(SELECT 1 n UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8\) numbers INNER JOIN dreams ON CHAR_LENGTH\(emotions_cn\) - CHAR_LENGTH\(REPLACE\(emotions_cn, ',', ''\)\) >= numbers.n - 1 WHERE emotions_cn IS NOT NULL AND emotions_cn != '' ORDER BY emotion;")

Bash(node -e "const e = require\('echarts'\); try { new e.graphic.RadialGradient\(0.5,0.5,1,[{offset:0,color:'red'},{offset:1,color:'blue'}]\); console.log\('OK'\); } catch\(err\) { console.log\('ERROR:', err.message\); }")
